SAM CARLSON / WRAPPED WORKS

Custom wire-wrapped stones • Steampunk • Rustic • Mystical • Lakewood, CA

Order by Email
copper•brass•reclaimed steel

Hand-built, one at a time

I make each piece by hand in my Lakewood workshop. Every polished stone is wrapped in copper, brass, and reclaimed industrial bits. Think steampunk meets earth magic — rustic, a little gritty, totally one-of-a-kind. No mass production, just slow craft.

— Sam

Recent Work

Custom Orders

I don't do carts. I do conversations. Tell me what you're drawn to, and I'll build it by hand.

01

Pick your stone

Amethyst, labradorite, quartz, turquoise, or bring your own found piece.

02

Choose wrap style

Copper, brass, mixed metal, or leather accent. Aged or bright finish.

03

Tell your story

Protection, grounding, gift, or just because it looks cool. I design to it.

04

I build it

Hand-wrapped in Lakewood. Photos before shipping. No two alike, ever.

Pricing starts around $45–120 depending on stone size and metalwork. Complex steampunk builds with gears & reclaimed bits start at $95. All orders via email — I'll quote within 24 hours.
